caption: A news broadcast from Plus TV Africa features a segment titled "PLUS POLITICS." A male news anchor wearing a dark suit, white shirt, and red tie is positioned on the left side of a split-screen, while a man wearing a red traditional cap and a patterned garment appears on the right. The on-screen text at the bottom reads "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." Logos for DStv CH 408 and StarTimes CH 308 are visible alongside the website "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV." As the video progresses, the scene shifts from the split-screen view to a full-screen shot of Bola Tinubu, who is wearing a red cap, glasses, and a light-colored traditional outfit. He is speaking while another man in a striped garment stands behind him to the left. The banner "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU" and the "PLUS POLITICS" label remain on screen throughout the transition.
